37.reason: [This line executes even when the stack is empty (after printing "error "), leading to undefined behavior (accessing Stack[-1]). It should be in an else block.]

46.reason: [This line executes even when the stack is full (after printing "error "), causing buffer overflow (writing to Stack[100] when top is 99). It should be in an else block.]
